title: RTS NatureScatter → Warlords 3D foliage
summary: Deterministic RTS foliage placements stored on Railway and rendered as CDN nature GLBs on the 1024m home island.
trigger: POST /api/island/export-from-rts (server generates scatter when heightmap present)
dataFlow: RTS export sends heightmap + seed + biome
Y re-snapped to upsampled terrain mesh via raycast
verify: Export from RTS-Grudge after heightmap export
Open /home-island — console shows [Island3D] RTS nature scatter: N/M instances
gaps: Wind sway shader not ported from RTS
Biome filter uses height-only; RTS biome-zone filter not replayed
